What is being added are ethereal cores which will have a time limit, which will still be usable on banners that cost limited cores
You got the better cores 😄
so they make new core for new event banner and still can use Luminous core to roll right ?
not for new event banner
Ok let me fill you in.

ethereal is time limited pulls that you can use before a deadline
after that it will convert to pure core (standard pull) if you didn’t use it before the deadline

Ethereal cores are replacing luminous ones in events (from what's seen)
They last for 4-5 months (a patch version)
Once they time out they become from timed luminous pulls to pure pulls

To compensate they will be giving out more pulls in general.

So it's a buff if you pull anyway, nerf for hoarding past the version patch

content: Make them make GUvhash 🙂
How did you know I like Uvhash too?
我特地翻出来骂人。你猫到底做没做过市场调研？一拍脑袋出个期间限定抽卡道具想干嘛？你不爱这个游戏可以申请换去别的组或者另谋高就，不要祸害忘却前夜了可以吗？？？

提供一点反馈供参考：

部分玩家，例如我的习惯是，在能够确定投入的情况下，第一时间把角色/命轮抽满或抽到一个理想情况。
而显然，部分随时间周期发放的空幻抽，会晚于这个时间点。

由于空幻抽会退化成无垢抽，至少失去一半价值(按溢出补偿来看)。
因此，为了避免损失，合理策略是，等待当期的空幻抽完全发放完毕后，再完成一期的抽取。

也就是说，要么我选择第一时间抽到爽，但是同时认知到自己承受了完全不必要的损失，是个冤大头；
要么采取上述策略，放弃第一时间拉满的快感，同时让我质疑自己为什么明明已经全氪满，还需要如此精打细算斤斤计较。

我只能引用一句流行语，“伤害不大，但侮辱性很强”。

望慎重考虑，祝好

From reddit: "iirc Light talked about this last year. He explained the differences between the skin tiers:

- 1 star : simple changes like altering key art composition or swapping small model parts like glasses

- 2 star: same key art composition but clothing changes with model updates

- 3 star: key art composition and outfit change significantly. VFX and SFX will also be adjusted to match the skin style

- 4 star: dynamic key art effects, new voice lines and might included unique frenzy story

- 5 star: "represents our highest level of craftmanship, with boundary-pushing designs"

(Both 4 and 5 stars are skin limited gacha)"

Feedback on Mouchette's AA: that is absolutely insane and makes the character's potential burst damage even more nuts. Rouses are searchable, so that effectively searches two free mortal coils out of thin air that refund the cost of the rouse. That just makes her have an even larger burst turn or get even more burst turns going
we have A LOT of rouses to complain about
Mouchette's one is just a bad idea.
pollux is also op and makes him quite a nice trash mob killer since his rouse cost also is refund itself on free hearts
AA should have been done in batches, so we could give at least some feedback
Yeah, agreed, standard > arc1 > arc 2
The fisrt batch of AA seemed like some small buffs (Ogier/Aigis etc)
its so funny the characters needing it more are the least affected
paints an ugly picture
Well yeah, that's like the main issue :/
It should've been more well-thought, AAs could be a very cool idea if used correctly

Unlocking a buff to the character after the rouse - OK, in principle this seems fine and could unlock new playstyles etc. So Mouchette gets more power from DR, plays into her playstyle...
She also gets two free cards that dupe the last played strike card, whilst being free - that basically means she has Thais's exalt slapped onto her _searchable rouse_. Mortal Coil also discounts.

So her Rouse is a 2-cost searchable card that gives her 50 exalt bar and a total of _six arith_ for the cost of two whilst ALSO giving her a buff
On a burst DPS character
She's already the best DPS in the game and this just makes her even more stupid, and this is a real shame when the devs made her OE make her have more utility rather than more raw power.
IMO it'd be much better if it worked like Faint's exalt instead of that card spawning effect. I.e. you pop rouse and you get +100 DR.
That'd allow a Mouchette team to be a little less dependent on DR wheels and grave covenant
It'd also allow Mouchette to be able to "call an ambulance BUT NOT FOR ME" once a boss fight if you hold onto the rouse until after a couple of DR procs to refill it
That's how these AAs should work - a bit of a raw power improvement but more about adding something new that the character did not already have
I am a big Mouchette fan and at the moment I would actively not want AA because it would just make her more boring to play
ok but it doesn’t let her generate keyflare on strikes so trash AA
damn

this is the first punch
the second is monday, right after all the content drops

Because this is a backward-looking change - everybody who has a stack of +12 chars gets their toys all at once. So a lot of chatter is going to be about whaled out characters that people can't realistically get, not the cool new character that just dropped that everyone is excited for
"2.5 dropped and was great" vs "2.5 dropped and the devs just broke the game's balance to reward all their whales" - big risk
